name: Podcast Notes
template_content:
Below is the content from a podcast or similar audio source. Summarize the key moments into show notes. Include sections that summarize the podcast's introduction, main topics of discussion, guest/host highlights, and any specific timestamps worth noting. Ensure the notes feel conversational, intriguing, and structured for quick reading.

Create the following structure:
- Podcast Title: [Podcast Episode Title]
- Episode Summary: [A brief 2-3 sentence description of the entire episode]
- Key Takeaways: [A list of the most important insights or advice, 3-5 points]
- Guest/Host Highlights: [Brief information about the guest(s) or host(s) and their key contributions to the episode]
- Timestamps (optional): [Include key moment timestamps if specific sections are revisited later on]
- Call to Action (CTA): [Prompt listeners to explore more content, subscribe, or visit the podcast's website]

Transcript:
{transcript}

Please format the output in valid Markdown format. Include bullet points, headings, and sub-section formatting for clarity.
